channel.title: How to control google ads on frontity from wordpress backend?
channel.description: I need help implementing google ads on frontity website and also i need to control ads from wordpress backend. I am new to frontity and I think it has good potential and I planing to build other projects using frontity. If anyone have any good solution please help.

item.title: How to control google ads on frontity from wordpress backend?
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @techymanjil96

Take a look at the Google Ad Manager package for Frontity. You can find some info about it here: Google Ad Manager

Refer to this GitHub issue for more info.

The package is quite new so the documentation is still being prepared.

Also check this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Esm8cs0jMoY

Hope this helps.

Read full topic
item.source: How to control google ads on frontity from wordpress backend?

item.title: How to control google ads on frontity from wordpress backend?

item.description:
I need help implementing google ads on frontity website and also i need to control ads from wordpress backend. I am new to frontity and I think it has good potential and I planing to build other projects using frontity. If anyone have any good solution please help.
